message:
feat(engine): add contract input policy ID linkage and duplicate bead ID validation to claim envelope

Extends the claim envelope contract to carry per-input policy ID
references and reject duplicate bead IDs across contract inputs.

Changes:
- Add optional contract_policy_id field to ContractInput, allowing each
  input to declare which upstream policy it references
- Add validation: React contract input (bd-1lsy.1.6.1) must carry
  contract_policy_id == REACT_CAPABILITY_CONTRACT_POLICY_ID; missing
  or mismatched values produce specific error messages
- Add collect_unique_ids check for contract_input bead IDs, rejecting
  duplicates to prevent ambiguous provenance chains
- Update rgc_claim_envelope_contract_v1.json fixture with the new field
- Document the contract input policy ID linkage in
  RGC_CLAIM_ENVELOPE_CONTRACT_V1.md
- Add test: validate_rejects_duplicate_input_bead_ids
- Update existing tests with contract_policy_id field in test fixtures

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -49,13 +49,15 @@
         "bead_id": "bd-1lsy.1.6.1",
         "contract_doc": "docs/RGC_REACT_CAPABILITY_CONTRACT_V1.md",
         "contract_json": "docs/rgc_react_capability_contract_v1.json",
+        "contract_policy_id": "policy-rgc-react-capability-contract-v1",
         "role": "defines the React-native compilation support rows that may enter the publishable board over time"
       },
       {
         "input_id": "v8_supremacy_contract",
         "bead_id": "bd-1lsy.1.6.2",
         "contract_doc": "docs/RGC_V8_SUPREMACY_CLAIM_CONTRACT_V1.md",
         "contract_json": "crates/franken-engine/tests/fixtures/rgc_v8_supremacy_claim_contract_v1.json",
+        "contract_policy_id": null,
         "role": "defines the declared supremacy board, required cells, and forbidden universal language"
       }
     ],

@@ -51,6 +51,11 @@ This contract consumes the already-defined inputs from:
 
 The envelope contract does not redefine the board. It binds phrase classes and
 publication surfaces to those existing board and capability definitions.
+Each upstream contract bead appears exactly once in `contract_inputs`.
+For the React input, both `contract_inputs` and `board_linkage` pin
+`policy-rgc-react-capability-contract-v1` so downstream publication consumers
+cannot silently retarget the React contract while keeping the same doc/json
+paths.
 
 ## Declared Board Linkage
